programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: After an epic chase around the globe, the team finally catches Rafaela, making it Ms. Nowhere's 100th arrest - and the agency is throwing her a party! Meanwhile, Cisco's uncle Tuco, a famous luchador in Mexico, is visiting town promoting his next show. But the celebration comes to a halt when there's an explosion at the party and an attack by a mysterious group of criminals!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: When the team is framed for the events of Ms. Nowhere's party, they're arrested and are on their way to separate government facilities. It's up to Frostee, with a help from Sissy, to track down the team and bust them out before they're locked up for good!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: While Lucky is eager to celebrate her first birthday on the frontier, a surprise visit from her Grandpa stirs up a controversy.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When an unexpected kitten shows up on Boss Baby’s doorstep, they go head to head against the feline enemy

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: Julien finds a bag of coffee beans in the Cove of Wonders and gets the entire lemur community hooked on caffeine.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: When Gran moves into the cave with The Croods, she drives Grug nuts and embarrasses Eep in front of the first-ever group of cool kids.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws Of Destiny
programme.desc: After absorbing the mystical Hero Chi of the Four Constellations, four panda kids enlist the Dragon Master to teach them Kung Fu

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots
programme.desc: Puss stumbles upon the legendary hidden city of San Lorenzo, and soon finds himself forced to protect it from thieves.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: On the hottest week of the year and a miserable time for babies, Boss and Tim infiltrates a country club with a very cool splash pad in order to find some way around their strict “no-babies” policy. Meanwhile, Banker Baby Benny visits the startup company to check on his investment. Tina has to cover up how the heat has split her coworkers into lawless factions fighting over a fan and a mist cooler.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: An overworked and under loved Precious has to choose between the Templeton Family startup business or Crispin Biscuits’ fun playtime. Meanwhile, the company makes its first purchase: upgraded communicators! R & D Baby Simmons is reluctant to fix the model they have, which picks up signals from her favorite lvorian soap opera, “Bridges Aflame.” Over a live broadcast, Simmons must convince the cast to tie up every loose plot thread before she has to lose the signal forever.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: Two paladins are led to the headquarters of a secret society

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: Keith and Hunk embark on a plan to travel inside a Weblum to harvest Scaultrite crystals

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: Lucky and her friends try to prevent Aunt Cora from leaving Miradero.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Porcupine didn't have quills, she had the softest coat in all of Tinga Tinga… and Jackal wanted it. Despite warnings from all the animals Porcupine allows Jackal to invite her to his cave to keep out of the rain. Porcupine takes off her coat to allow it to dry, but while she sleeps naughty Jackal runs off with it. When she awakes Porcupine is covered in lots of tiny ant bites and they itch and they itch and they itch. Tortoise suggests Elephant squeeze some milk from the Milky Quill bush… but Porcupine can't wait anymore and runs into the Quill bushes to relieve her itching. Crash! Crash! Crash! Porcupine crashes through the Quill bushes and emerges covered in spikey quills! The animals can't believe their eyes! But Porcupine is delighted as no beast will ever come near her sensitive skin ever again! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Lizard didn't hide under rocks. He would scamper around Tinga Tinga pinching other animals food and keeping it all for himself. Then one day the animals decide to give greedy Lizard a dose of his own medicine. When Lizard realizes the error of his ways he runs and hides under a rock too ashamed to show his face in Tinga Tinga. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Big Chris has agreed to do a parachute jump for charity but loses his nerve on the big day. Can Roary talk him through it, just like Big Chris did for him when he got scared?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: The brass band booked for the Silver Hatch parade have cancelled. Mr Carburettor will be furious if he doesn't have music at his parade. Roary and his friends think up an ingenious plan...

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Hellie makes an emergency landing. Despite everyone's efforts, Hellie won't fly again… what could the problem be?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: James has broken down so Mama Mia comandeers Plugger to run her about. Mama Mia has a wonderful time with Plugger and James is jealous. He tries to remedy the situation with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Big Chris realises that he only ever has good luck when he has his lucky mascot with him. But what happens when he loses it on race day?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Roary and Plugger really want Big Chris to take part in the fun run but Big Chris isn't so sure. Can they make sure he trains for it without even realising?

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp has a new trick with his bubbles: he can have his friends put voice messages inside that you hear when you pop them. But when Pixie decides she doesn’t want the others to hear what’s in her bubble, the chase is on to rescue it! / Juniper is devastated when the traditional ceremony to celebrate her next level of spark achievement can’t happen. Kelp helps introduce a new tradition.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Aggro, Burple and Cutter are left alone in the roost to care for some dragon eggs, but a trio of tricky Slinkwings want those eggs for themselves.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: Revvit maps a path to a magical forest where the Dinotrux can explore and have fun, but once they arrive the crew is startled by Towaconstrictors

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: When the Desert Scraptors mistakenly think Click-Clack is their leader, D-Structs' plan to have them attack Ty and the crew is derailed.

programme.desc: Captain Underpants becomes a wanted man in underwear when footage surfaces of a robber who looks exactly like him. George and Harold, positive it's an impostor, try to track down the perp and bring him to justice. But can the boys do this before Captain Underpants is found guilty?

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: As a prank, George and Harold use Melvin's new animal hybrid invention to create a creature that's a cross between a butt and a fly. But some of the monster butt-erflies want to eat everything in sight- including the students hiding out in the school gym!

programme.title: Clown
programme.desc: A loving father becomes a savage killer while wearing a cursed clown costume that won't come off.

programme.title: The Golden Holiday
programme.desc: Byeong-Soo works as a detective in the countryside and takes his family on a trip to the Philippines. He becomes involved in a crime planned by Patric, becoming a murder suspect.

programme.title: Prison on Fire 2
programme.desc: A convict befriends a fellow inmate and escapes from jail to visit his son in an orphanage.

programme.title: The Outpost
programme.desc: A small team of U.S. soldiers battles against hundreds of Taliban fighters in Afghanistan.

programme.title: Remember
programme.desc: The story of Pil-Joo, an Alzheimer's patient in his 80s, who lost all his family during the Japanese colonial era, and devotes his lifelong revenge before his memories disappear, and a young man in his 20s who helps him.

programme.title: There Are No Saints
programme.desc: A man nicknamed "the Jesuit," is imprisoned for a crime he didn't commit. When his wife is murdered and his son kidnapped and taken to Mexico, he devises an elaborate and dangerous plan to rescue his son and avenge the murder.

programme.title: The Goblin
programme.desc: Former gangster Doo-hyun, known as "Goblin", served time for his boss' murder to protect Young-min. Out of prison, Young-min kidnaps Doo-hyun's daughter, forcing him to seek vengeance and reclaim his "Goblin" persona.

programme.title: Deliver Us from Evil
programme.desc: An assassin goes to Thailand in order to solve a kidnapping case and finds himself chased by a man whose sibling he killed.

programme.title: Royal Tramp 2
programme.desc: After being exposed, Lung-er is bent on eliminating the person who disclosed her true identity - Wai Siu-bo but complications ensue when Lung-er is assigned to protect Ng Ying-hung who is betrothed to Princess Kin-ning and Wai Siu-bo is assigned to be her escort by the Emperor.

programme.title: Spiritwalker
programme.desc: A memory-impaired man discovers he gains consciousness in a new body every 12 hours. To uncover the truth, he must piece together his real identity while evading attacks from pursuing agents and dangerous criminals alike.

programme.title: The Late Bloomer
programme.desc: The story of an adult male who, after the successful removal of a benign tumor resting against his pituitary gland, experiences all the changes and effects of puberty over a three-week period.

programme.title: Brahms: The Boy 2
programme.desc: Terror strikes a young family when they move into a new home and their son discovers a hauntingly life-like porcelain doll called Brahms.

programme.title: Dosukoi Love
programme.desc: Overweight, Ayane Sukehira went to Italy for chocolates. After an accident, found herself totally changed. She went back to Japan and begins to work as an esthetician.

programme.title: Four Corners - Episode 7
programme.desc: The multi-award winning Four Corners returns for another year of powerhouse investigative journalism - fearless and forensic, exposing scandals, triggering inquiries, leading debate and holding power to account for 65 years.

programme.title: Media Watch - Episode 9
programme.desc: Australia's leading forum for media analysis and comment. Host Linton Besser, a four-time Walkley award-winning investigative reporter and former foreign correspondent, brings you a fearless critique of the week's journalism.

programme.title: Ange And The Boss: Puskas in Australia
programme.desc: A great story about Australian migration and soccer through the story of Hungarian National, Ference Puskas.

programme.title: Play On - Episode 3
programme.desc: Series 2 takes audiences into the inner sanctum of a Fijian rugby team, a suburban cricket team captained by a former Sri Lankan superstar and up close to the grit and tenacity of the Tiwi Bombers.

programme.title: AFL Premiership Season - Round 4 - Richmond v Port Adelaide
programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

programme.title: AFL Premiership Season - Round 4 - West Coast Eagles v Sydney Swans
programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

programme.title: A Brief History Of Cricket Down Under: The 80s - Out Of Left Field
programme.desc: From aluminium bats, to broken jaws, and a piglet and a duck, we're taking a romp through the '80s most outrageous and unforgettable moments that caught us by surprise, captured our imaginations and often made us smile.

programme.title: Four Corners - Episode 7
programme.desc: The multi-award winning Four Corners returns for another year of powerhouse investigative journalism - fearless and forensic, exposing scandals, triggering inquiries, leading debate and holding power to account for 65 years.

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent - Episode 5
programme.desc: As world news continues to dominate our headlines, Foreign Correspondent is back in 2026 with an action-packed season of stories reflecting the times in which we live.

programme.title: ABC News Overnight - Episode 27
programme.desc: The final word on the day's top stories, with the latest news and updated information from Australia's most trusted source of independent news.

programme.title: The World This Week - Episode 11
programme.desc: Girish Sawlani brings you a weekly roundup of international news from an Australian perspective as reported by ABC News correspondents covering the Indo Pacific, Europe, North America, the Middle East, India and Indonesia.

programme.title: Portrait Artist Of The Year - Episode 5
programme.desc: In this heat, nine artists have four hours to create a portrait of a celebrity sitter: Paralympian Madison de Rozario OAM, TV and radio host Amanda Keller, and actor/comedian Matt Okine.

programme.title: The Pool
programme.desc: Bondi Icebergs is the most photographed pool in the world. For nearly a century this spectacular 50 metre stretch of sparkling blue at the southern end of Bondi Beach has occupied a special corner in the hearts of millions.

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent - Episode 5
programme.desc: As world news continues to dominate our headlines, Foreign Correspondent is back in 2026 with an action-packed season of stories reflecting the times in which we live.

programme.title: The Pacific - Episode 3
programme.desc: The Pacific region is rich with culture, people and stories. Johnson Raela and Alice Lolohea bring you the stories that matter to the Pacific and the most up-to-date information, from journalists with deep regional expertise.

programme.title: The World This Week - Episode 11
programme.desc: Girish Sawlani brings you a weekly roundup of international news from an Australian perspective as reported by ABC News correspondents covering the Indo Pacific, Europe, North America, the Middle East, India and Indonesia.

programme.title: That Pacific Sports Show - Episode 9
programme.desc: Join Tiana Penitani Gray and Sam Wykes for your weekly hit of Pacific joy, as they share inspiring stories and incredible sporting prowess of athletes with Pacific Island heritage, from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: A Brief History Of Cricket Down Under: The 80s - Out Of Left Field
programme.desc: From aluminium bats, to broken jaws, and a piglet and a duck, we're taking a romp through the '80s most outrageous and unforgettable moments that caught us by surprise, captured our imaginations and often made us smile.

programme.title: Weekend Breakfast - Episode 28
programme.desc: All the news you need to start your day. Fauziah Ibrahim and Johanna Nicholson bring you the latest news, interviews, politics, culture, weather and global affairs. Plus sport with Jared Coote.

programme.desc: All the news you need to start your day. Fauziah Ibrahim and Johanna Nicholson bring you the latest news, interviews, politics, culture, weather and global affairs. Plus sport with Jared Coote.

programme.title: The Pool

programme.desc: Join Tiana Penitani Gray and Sam Wykes for your weekly hit of Pacific joy, as they share inspiring stories and incredible sporting prowess of athletes with Pacific Island heritage, from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: Back Roads - Outback Way, NT (Part 1)
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part special, Back Roads takes a trip on The Outback Way, also known as Australia's longest shortcut, where Lisa Millar finds remote communities reaching out to the world in surprising ways.

programme.title: Landline - Episode 7
programme.desc: A tasty sampler of stories from the land - covering food, agriculture, crops, climate, business and innovation - as we meet the fascinating people who make our rural and regional communities unique. Presented by Pip Courtney.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon - Episode 28
programme.desc: Melissa Mackay presents the latest from ABC News on the weekend bringing you today's top stories and coverage of events as they unfold. Plus original reporting, analysis and updated news, sport, weather and information.

programme.title: Fight Club
programme.desc: Sick of his dead end, white bred existence, Jack encounters an intriguing stranger who alters his relationship with reality.

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: The famed monster hunter is sent to Transylvania to stop Count Dracula, who is using Dr. Frankenstein's research and a werewolf for nefarious purposes.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: Kevin Bacon and Fred Ward are in a fight for their lives when they discover that their desolate town has been infested with gigantic man-eating creatures that live below the ground!

programme.title: Saw
programme.desc: A sadistic serial killer abducts the morally wayward and forces them to make impossible choices in a horrific game of survival.

programme.title: Pillow Talk
programme.desc: The uninhibited story of a carefree bachelor and a carefree career girl and the hilarious things that happen when they tangle.

programme.title: Rocky III
programme.desc: Rocky faces the ultimate challenge from a powerful new contender, and must turn to a former rival to help regain his throne as the undisputed fighting champion.

programme.title: Executive Decision
programme.desc: In a chillingly prescient story, 400 terrified passengers face death on a plane hijacked by terrorists. In a daring rescue attempt, an elite military unit boards the plane ... but as they hurtle toward Washington, D.C., the president must decide whether to destroy the plane or allow the heroes time to overpower the terrorists.

programme.title: Walking Tall (2004)
programme.desc: Chris Vaughn, a former soldier of the US Special Forces, returns to his hometown, where he discovers that it has been overrun by a shady casino owner and corrupt police officers.

programme.desc: In order to learn and master Terastallization, Liko, Roy, and Dot have joined the Naranja Academy's "Tera Training"! And so begins their adventure in Paldea Region, setting their sights on their Terastallization debut!

programme.desc: Evie is on a mission to be the best runner in her school! However Med and Aidan aren't quite up for this task. Evie decides to bring in a pro coach to whip them all into shape...but will the boys get stronger and faster? In another fitness adventure, the Busy Bodies visit a Muay Thai gym to work on their punching and kicking skills. Hopefully, no-one gets hurt!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Go Rush!! - EP 18
programme.desc: Twins Yuhi and Yuamu Ohdo believe there's alien life beyond the stars, even though their attempts to prove it have only ended in failure their hard work and dedication are about to pay off when an extraterrestrial finally arrives on Earth!

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug & Cat Noir S4 - EP 21
programme.desc: The continuing adventures of Marinette and Adrien, two normal teens, transform into superheroes Ladybug and Cat Noir when evil threatens their city!

programme.title: Beyblade X S2 - EP 35

programme.title: World’s Wildest Weather: Caught On Camera - EP 7
programme.desc: A funny and frightening rollercoaster journey investigating our planet’s most extreme weather as told and filmed by ordinary people caught in the eye of the storm’. We follow the incredible human stories of the families caught up in snowstorms, avalanches, floods, landslides, terrifying wildfires and too close for comfort lightning strikes. The film uses jaw dropping, often never-before-seen footage, captured on cameras and phones.

programme.title: The Grudge
programme.desc: An American nurse living and working in Tokyo is exposed to a mysterious supernatural curse, one that locks a person in a powerful rage before claiming their life and spreading to another victim.

programme.title: Incredible Tales S8 - EP 9
programme.desc: Sylvia thinks that her husband is involved in an affair. She spends thousands to try and catch her husband red-handed. Her depression goes out of control and she even attempts-suicide. Is death the answer for her? Or will someone who owes her a favor, help her in time?

programme.title: Joy of Life 2 - EP 20 庆余年 2
programme.desc: The drama continues from the first season of the Joy of Life trilogy, following the story of Fan Xian as he gains a stronghold in the court to eventually overthrow Emperor Liu Yu.

programme.title: Fire Up - EP 19 美味下半场
programme.desc: Ying Cai takes control and reveals his true self by chasing Ying Xiong's mother out of the house. Ying Xiong finds out that his mother is homeless. He confronts Ying Cai and threatens to kill him. Mei Mei rushes to the club to find Ying Xiong, worrying that he will get into trouble. However, she finds Ying Cai lying unconsciously in a bed of blood while Ying Xiong is nowhere in sight.

programme.title: Home In Toa Payoh - EP 5 家在大巴窑
programme.desc: Baomei, Pengkun and Guocheng are childhood friends from Toa Payoh. Baomei is a thrifty bachelor and factory foreman. Pengkun, a skilled technician, often sneaks off early to be with his family. Guocheng is a successful insurance salesman with a loving yet nagging wife. Together, they and their families deal with the gossipy, quarrelsome Auntie Fen and her frequent clashes with Guocheng’s father-in-law.

programme.desc: Host Tony Hung and Priscilla Wong are reunited in this travlegue tailor-made for them. Starting from Adelaide and crossing the Great Ocean Road to Melbourne. Tasmania is the place where the two first filmed their travelogue. The two have known each other since their youth and have gone through different stages of life at the same time, becoming good friends.

programme.title: Focus - EP 1 焦点
programme.desc: The Middle East conflict is forcing flights to take long detours, hitting aviation hubs in Dubai and Doha. Is the global airline industry facing a reshuffle? Meanwhile, the U.S. has launched another tariff investigation, with our country included—how will this impact the industry? Cultural award winner Goh Boon Teck has led his team in bringing Singapore theatre to the global stage.

programme.title: Murder on the Menu - EP 5 饭罪现场
programme.desc: The Culinary Investigation Division faces a criminal mastermind who is obsessed with radio DJs. Chief Inspector Jeremy gets the detectives with experience in radio hosting - Ben Yeo, Zhu Ze Liang and Chen Ning, but they are puzzled about the digits at the crime scene. Also, do the love messages dedicated to the DJs mean anything that can help them solve the case?

programme.title: Golden Age Talentime 2026 S1 - EP 14 黄金年华之斗歌竞艺
programme.desc: After decades devoted to careers and family, these senior contestants enter a new chapter of life. Golden Age Talentime follows their journey as they rediscover long-held music dreams. The brand-new series will continue the team battle concept, creating a platform with greater diversity and excitement for the seniors to have an equal chance to stay till the end.

programme.title: Connecting Earth and Sky - EP 12 与天地对话
programme.desc: Four artistes, Philip Keung, Sisley Choi, Bob Lam and Shawn Yue, all from different background pays a visit to South Yemen, Socotra Island, the Great Barrier Reef, Ayers Rock in the Northern Territory to explore the four aspects of life. In the programme, artistes will share their life stories, how they deal with adversity. What is the scariest thing in life? Who do they live for? Does character determine destiny?

programme.title: An Everlasting Dunhuang Banquet - EP 3 敦煌千年不散的宴席
programme.desc: China has been a place where its heritage and culture spans over 5,000 years of historical facts and naaratives. In the documentary, the programme presents the food culture of Dunhuang murals and faithfully records the current living conditions, three meals a day, and the process of food processing of Dunhuang people to show the inheritance and development of Dunhuang food culture.

programme.title: Unforgivable - EP 15 不可饶恕的罪恶
programme.desc: With Shu Ya's help, Guan Lin finally locates her mother, Wang Jinxiang. She is reluctant to acknowledge her daughter due to years of shame and fear, but eventually gives in after seeing how much Guan Lin misses her. Weiliang kidnaps Qiqi, a little girl that Jinxiang treasures dearly. Qiqi desperately seeks help, hoping to escape from Weiliang's clutches.

programme.title: Unforgivable - EP 16 不可饶恕的罪恶
programme.desc: A member of SOD suddenly disappears. As the search begins, tragic news comes unexpectedly. The entire team is plunged into a state of sorrow and confusion. Detective Wang from the major crime unit is assigned to investigate this case. Weiliang's actions of kidnapping children are exposed. Feeling the pressure, his behaviour becomes increasingly irrational and dangerous.

programme.title: Let's Go Home S3 - EP 1 我们回家吧 (第三季)
programme.desc: Let’s Go Home 3 makes a return, bringing a cross-border journey filled with new emotions and surprises! Led by host Bowie Tsang, the show brings together a lineup of cross-industry celebrity guests — including Hsieh Ying-Hsuan, Annie Chen, Ethan Ruan, Tanya Chua and more — as they embark on a heartfelt journey home, rediscovering their most genuine connections with their hometowns, families, and themselves.

programme.title: Circle of Life - EP 2 生生不息
programme.desc: At the Gansu Endangered Animal Protection Center, lives the only population of saiga antelopes in China. Their caretaker, Zhao, has worked with them for 20 years, yet still cannot get within three meters of them. Their instinctive wariness toward humans seems deeply ingrained in the very genes of the saiga antelope.

programme.title: Giant Panda Yun Chuan and Xin Bao - EP 2 大熊猫云川和鑫宝
programme.desc: Since Bai Yun arrived at the San Diego Zoo in 1996, giant pandas have quickly become its most treasured and beloved residents. The arrival of Yun Chuan and Xin Bao is highly anticipated — they are set to become the zoo’s next superstars. To welcome them, the zoo is renovating its original panda exhibit, now named Panda Ridge, designed to closely recreate the pandas’ natural habitat and provide them with a comfortable new home.

programme.title: Miss Monte Cristo - EP 73 基督山小姐
programme.desc: This is a suspenseful revenge drama about a woman whose life was destroyed by the friends she trusted most. After making up her mind to take revenge on those who betrayed her, she returns to reclaim the life that was stolen from her.

programme.desc: Oh Soo-jae is a talented lawyer who gets caught up in an unexpected case. At law school, she meets the student Gong Chan, who falls in love with her and would do anything to protect her.

programme.title: Susu Lima Kupang
programme.desc: This story centers on Zakaria, a nine-year-old boy living in poverty with his autistic mother and grandmother. Isolated and bullied for being fatherless, Zakaria finds solace in his friendship with a goat he lovingly names Maryam. When Maryam accidentally breaks his mother’s cherished radio, causing her emotional distress, Zakaria is determined to make things right.

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 2
programme.desc: Sally thought she is to be promoted but there's another candidate for that role as well. Everyone in Big Buzz is wondering who is their new boss. They only know his name - J.P. Meanwhile, Zainab continues to set up another blind date for Ashraf, much to the dismay of Mazlan. While on the blind date, something happened to Ashraf's date.

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 3
programme.desc: Bob wants to have kids but Sally doesn't want for now as she is eyeing for a promotion. Mazlan wants to pick up a new hobby - cycling. J.P is eager to know his employees well in Big Buzz. When Ashraf realises that he may have feelings for his best friend, he decides to tell her how he really feels, only to find out that Nadia MAY be secretly dating behind his back!

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 4
programme.desc: Ashraf feels he's being cheated because Nadia didn't tell him about JP. Mazlan is trying to hide from Zainab that he got to know a lady cyclist. A server breakdown in Big Buzz leads to an unexpected discovery for the whole office.

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 5
programme.desc: Ashraf promises to Nadia that he will fix the damage that he had caused. Bob tries to convince Sally that the time is now to have children. Nenek starts working with the Non Nom Boys but all doesn't seem well. All is looking good for Nadia as she managed to save the Kirro Campaign but tension is in the air when she finally meets J.P's stepmother, Martha Pereira.

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 6
programme.desc: Bob tries to set up a date for Ashraf with a staff from another department in the Pereira Group. Some money is missing at the food truck and Razli is adamant to find out who is the culprit. Sally's company is doing a Game's Day and she needs Bob to help her win over Anson. Nadia's meeting with Martha was bad but a sudden appearance from J.P turned Ashraf's world upside down.

programme.title: Zero to Millionaire
programme.desc: Ahmad, Hamid and Mahmud (Mad, Mid, Mud) are three brothers who work as car washers. One time a customer accused them of scratching his car. Mad denied and acted aggressively on the customer. As a result, Mad, Mid and Mud were arrested and charged. Suddenly they were guaranteed by an entrepreneur named Tuan Abu. In order to avoid further prosecution, Tuan Abu requires Mad, Mid and Mud to work in his old people's welfare home.

programme.desc: Crafted from 100% natural leaves including gymnema, mulberry and green tea, the Naturalle Sugar Care tea is mild-flavoured and low in calories. As the poison starts to take effect, Zhi Ming does his best to escort Guo Ying back on land for treatment despite being poisoned himself.

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 7
programme.desc: Nadia introduces her bridesmaids to Ashraf and in come Jen, Nadia's cousin. The one who Ashraf ghosted 16 years ago. Zainab hired a private investigator as she suspects that Mazlan is having an affair. A renowned food reviewer is coming to check on The Nom Nom Boys. As they were helping out the wedding prep, Ashraf and Jen seems to hit it off... wrongly.

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 8
programme.desc: Martha tries to convince J.P not to get married to Nadia. Zainab follows Mazlan discreetly and find out the truth. Sally reveals to Bob that she is pregnant.. much to the delight of Bob and the dismay of Sally. Seeing Ashraf and Jen happy with one another makes Nadia have doubts if she has feelings towards Ashraf in the first place. To make matters worse, Martha came to see Ashraf and tell him something that can ruin the wedding.

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 9
programme.desc: Bob is oblivious that J.P is sending him to Bangkok for an urgent client presentation. Zainab met her ex crush back in secondary school, Zack, and got smitten by him. J.P is asking for Ashraf's help as he loses his card. Jen organised a Bachelorette Party and discovers that Nadia might have feelings towards Ashraf. J.P came back home and someone from the past is waiting for him, Sherilyn!

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 10
programme.desc: It's the eve of the wedding and the caterer goes missing! Not just the caterer but J.P goes missing as well and Ashraf feels he knows why. Bob is extremely frustrated that Sally didn't spend time with him to resolve their differences. Mazlan finally opens up about Yanni to Zainab. After almost 17 years, Ashraf did what he failed countless times to do before.

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 11
programme.desc: The year is 2007. Before Nadia, there was this girl in the school by the name of Shayla Anggulia who Ashraf had a big crush on. Bob, an avid basketball player back then, likes to chat on the internet and happens to be in touch with a girl known as Naddy143. When Bob finally wants to meet Naddy143, he asked Ashraf to accompany him. That is when Ashraf met Nadia... AKA Naddy143 for the first time.

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 12
programme.desc: The wedding day. Ashraf and Nadia realised that J.P goes missing (again!) after the incident last night. Something happened to Sally as she and Bob were searching for J.P. Mazlan tried to teach Zainab how to cycle but it's not easy as it seems. An unexpected assistance from someone led Ashraf and Nadia to J.P.

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 13
programme.desc: Nadia, J.P and Ashraf arrived just in time for the solemnisation. After the mishap, Sally is determined to attend the wedding. Nadia and J.P finally weds and Ashraf disappeared just before the wedding is over, much to the dismay of Nadia. After one year of moving away and not contacting, Ashraf comes back and finally meet his friends. And Nadia.

programme.title: Kelab Prefect - EP 1

Easy to clean, built to last, and stylish, it makes every meal a delight and is the perfect choice for a modern, premium kitchen. 升级厨房体验，选择德国制造的 Fissler Stardust Forte！时尚耐用，10层钛强化 Protectal® 不粘涂层，即使烹饪重口味菜肴也不粘、不焦。人体工学手柄握感舒适稳固，防滴漏锅边避免溢出，CookStar®锅底适用所有炉具（含电磁炉），加热均匀、省心省力。易清洁、耐用又有型，让每一餐都成为享受，是现代高端厨房的理想之选。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Ellixi Hair Tonic

programme.title: FIBA 3x3 Asia Cup 2026
programme.desc: Top basketball stars from across Asia and Oceania will light up Singapore once again as the FIBA 3x3 Asia Cup returns to the Lion City for the fifth consecutive year from 1 to 5 Apr 2026, as the teams will compete for regional supremacy and qualification for global events. The 2025 edition saw Australia once again claim both the men’s and women’s titles, reinforcing the tournament’s reputation as one of the most competitive 3x3 events in the region.
